testcase.name: test_06_get_period_balance_monthly
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_leave_rules.py:227: in test_06_get_period_balance_monthly assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 401: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_leave_rules.py:273: in test_07_get_period_balance_quarterly assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 401: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_09_apply_leave_validates_period_balance
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_leave_rules.py:367: in test_09_apply_leave_validates_period_balance if balance["casual_available"] > 0: ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'casual_available'
